name: C5 — Cloud Computing Compliance Criteria Catalogue
owner: Germany Federal Office for Information Security (BSI)
description: BSI's Cloud Computing Compliance Criteria Catalogue (C5) — baseline security criteria for cloud service providers, used as the basis for independent C5 attestation audits performed under ISAE 3000 (structurally comparable to SOC 2 / ISO 27001). C5:2020 defines 121 criteria across 17 domains with a General Conditions series (BC-01…BC-06). C5:2026 (v1.0.1) defines 168 criteria across the same 17 audited domains, expanded into 623 sub-criteria typed Basic (suffix B), Additional/Complementing (AC) and Additional/Sharpening (AS), plus a separate General Conditions series now numbered GC-01…GC-06.
relationToCloudSecurity: Core cloud-security assurance catalogue; the de facto standard for cloud security attestation in Germany and widely referenced across the DACH region.
relationToAISecurity: Complemented by AIC4, which extends C5-style attestation to AI-based cloud services.

license.notes: C5:2026 is licensed CC BY-ND 4.0 (© BSI 2026). Verbatim redistribution with attribution is permitted; NoDerivatives. The CSV/JSON here is a faithful format-shift of BSI's official editable workbook (C5_2026_editable.xlsx) — criteria text reproduced verbatim, no edits — hosted for reference and machine consumption. The earlier C5:2020 edition in this directory was published under general BSI terms of use, not CC BY-ND.

lifecycle.notes: C5:2026 v1.0.1 (initial publication v1.0.0, 2026-04-07) is the current edition and supersedes C5:2020. Both editions' structured data are retained in this directory.

notes: Enriched from auto-generated bulk metadata. Reclassified from regulation to control (C5 is an attestation criteria catalogue, not legislation). C5:2026 structured data added 2026-07 as a verbatim format-shift of BSI's editable workbook (CC BY-ND 4.0, attribution to BSI).
